auth.enterCredentials: Please enter your username and password.
auth.passwordChanged: Password updated. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.passwordMustChange: Your account uses a temporary password. Choose a new one to continue — you'll be signed out afterwards and can log in with it.

dashboard.noFilesYet: No files uploaded yet. Drop some above to get started.

upload.caption: Caption (optional)
upload.fileExceedsMaxSize: File exceeds the maximum allowed size.

fileList.publicLinkDesc: Available from the internet. For people outside your network.
fileList.localLinkDesc: Available only to devices on your local network.

admin.publicBaseUrlHint: Address given to users in public file sharing links
admin.showLocalLinkHint: Add a link for devices on the same network
admin.localBaseUrlHint: Used instead of the public address when accessed from the local network
admin.localPortHint: Port the service is reachable on at the local address
admin.maxFileSizeHint: Files larger than this cannot be uploaded
admin.cleanupIntervalHint: How often expired files are automatically removed
admin.resetPasswordConfirm: Reset the password for "{username}"? A new temporary password will be generated.
admin.userDeleteConfirm: Delete "{username}" and all their files? This can't be undone.
admin.userAlreadyExists: A user with this username already exists.
admin.sharePasswordWith: Share this one-time password with {username}. They must change it on next login.
admin.enterQuotaGreaterThanZero: Enter a quota greater than zero, or choose "No limit".
admin.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: You cannot delete your own account
admin.uploadFile: Drag & drop a file here to start your share.
admin.uploadSizeLimit: We can accept only files that are less than {limit} in total.
